kList\Policies">
      <securityDescriptor name="NetworkListPoliciesKey_SDDL" />
    </registryKey>
    <registryKey keyName="HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\CLSID\{DCB00C01-570F-4A9B-8D69-199FDBA5723B}\">
      <registryValue name="" valueType="REG_SZ" value="NetworkListManager" />
      <securityDescriptor name="WRP_KEY_DEFAULT_SDDL" />
    </registryKey>
    <registryKey keyName="HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\CLSID\{DCB00C01-570F-4A9B-8D69-199FDBA5723B}\InProcServer32\">
      <registryValue name="" valueType="REG_EXPAND_SZ" value="%SystemRoot%\System32\netprofm.dll" />
      <registryValue name="ThreadingModel" valueType="REG_SZ" value="Both" />
    </registryKey>
    <registryKey keyName="HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\CLSID\{DCB00C01-570F-4A9B-8D69-199FDBA5723B}\TypeLib">
      <registryValue name="" valueType="REG_SZ" value="{DCB00D01-570F-4A9B-8D69-199FDBA5723B}" />
    </registryKey>
    <registryKey keyName="HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\CLSID\{DCB00C01-570F-4A9B-8D69-199FDBA5723B}\Version">
      <registryValue name="" valueType="REG_SZ" value="1.0" />
    </registryKey>
